CVE-2002-1214.name: MS02-063 PPTP Malformed Control Data Kernel Denial of Service
CVE-2002-1214.description:
This module exploits a kernel based overflow when sending abnormal PPTP Control Data
          packets	to Microsoft Windows 2000 SP0-3 and XP SP0-1 based PPTP RAS servers
          (Remote Access Services). Kernel memory is overwritten resulting in a BSOD.
          Code execution may be possible however this module is only a DoS.

CVE-2002-0422.name: Microsoft IIS HTTP Internal IP Disclosure
CVE-2002-0422.description:
Collect any leaked internal IPs by requesting commonly redirected locations from IIS.
          CVE-2000-0649 references IIS 5.1 (win2k, XP) and older.  However, in newer servers
          such as IIS 7+, this occurs when the alternateHostName is not set or misconfigured. Also
          collects internal IPs leaked from the PROPFIND method in certain IIS versions.

CVE-2002-0422.name: HTTP WebDAV Internal IP Scanner
CVE-2002-0422.description: Detect webservers internal IPs though WebDAV

CVE-2002-1864.name: Simple Web Server 2.3-RC1 Directory Traversal
CVE-2002-1864.description:
This module exploits a directory traversal vulnerability found in
          Simple Web Server 2.3-RC1.

CVE-2002-1473.name: HP-UX LPD Command Execution
CVE-2002-1473.description:
This exploit abuses an unpublished vulnerability in the
          HP-UX LPD service. This flaw allows an unauthenticated
          attacker to execute arbitrary commands with the privileges
          of the root user. The LPD service is only exploitable when
          the address of the attacking system can be resolved by the
          target. This vulnerability was silently patched with the
          buffer overflow flaws addressed in HP Security Bulletin
          HPSBUX0208-213.

CVE-2002-1643.name: RealServer Describe Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-1643.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in RealServer 7/8/9
          and was based on Johnny Cyberpunk's THCrealbad exploit. This
          code should reliably exploit Linux, BSD, and Windows-based
          servers.

CVE-2002-1318.name: Samba 2.2.2 - 2.2.6 nttrans Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-1318.description:
This module attempts to exploit a buffer overflow vulnerability present in
          versions 2.2.2 through 2.2.6 of Samba.

          The Samba developers report this as:
          "Bug in the length checking for encrypted password change requests from clients."

          The bug was discovered and reported by the Debian Samba Maintainers.

CVE-2002-0392.name: Apache Win32 Chunked Encoding
CVE-2002-0392.description:
This module exploits the chunked transfer integer wrap
          vulnerability in Apache version 1.2.x to 1.3.24. This
          particular module has been tested with all versions of the
          official Win32 build between 1.3.9 and 1.3.24. Additionally,
          it should work against most co-branded and bundled versions
          of Apache (Oracle 8i, 9i, IBM HTTPD, etc).

          You will need to use the Check() functionality to determine
          the exact target version prior to launching the exploit. The
          version of Apache bundled with Oracle 8.1.7 will not
          automatically restart, so if you use the wrong target value,
          the server will crash.

CVE-2002-2268.name: Kolibri HTTP Server HEAD Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-2268.description: This exploits a stack buffer overflow in version 2 of the Kolibri HTTP server.

CVE-2002-2268.name: Webster HTTP Server GET Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-2268.description:
This exploits a stack buffer overflow in the Webster HTTP server.
          The server and source code was released within an article from
          the Microsoft Systems Journal in February 1996 titled "Write a
          Simple HTTP-based Server Using MFC and Windows Sockets".
Kolibri HTTP Server 2.0 - HEAD Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2002-2268.author: Metasploit

CVE-2002-2268.description: Webster HTTP Server - GET Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2002-2268.author: Metasploit

CVE-2002-1120.name: Savant 3.1 Web Server Overflow
CVE-2002-1120.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Savant 3.1 Web Server. The service
          supports a maximum of 10 threads (for a default install). Each exploit attempt
          generally causes a thread to die whether successful or not. Therefore, in a default
          configuration, you only have 10 chances.

          Due to the limited space available for the payload in this exploit module, use of the
          "ord" payloads is recommended.
Savant Web Server 3.1 - GET Universal Remote Overflow
CVE-2002-1120.author: Jacopo Cervini

CVE-2002-1120.description: Savant Web Server 3.1 - Remote Buffer Overflow (2)
CVE-2002-1120.author: basher13

CVE-2002-1120.description: Savant Web Server 3.1 - Remote Buffer Overflow (3)
CVE-2002-1120.author: DouBle_Zer0

CVE-2002-1142.name: MS02-065 Microsoft IIS MDAC msadcs.dll RDS DataStub Content-Type Overflow
CVE-2002-1142.description:
This module can be used to execute arbitrary code on IIS servers
          that expose the /msadc/msadcs.dll Microsoft Data Access Components
          (MDAC) Remote Data Service (RDS) DataFactory service. The service is
          exploitable even when RDS is configured to deny remote connections
          (handsafe.reg). The service is vulnerable to a heap overflow where
          the RDS DataStub 'Content-Type' string is overly long. Microsoft Data
          Access Components (MDAC) 2.1 through 2.6 are known to be vulnerable.
Microsoft IIS - MDAC 'msadcs.dll' RDS DataStub Content-Type Overflow (MS02-065) (Metasploit)
CVE-2002-1142.author: Metasploit

CVE-2002-0649.name: MS02-039 Microsoft SQL Server Resolution Overflow
CVE-2002-0649.description:
This is an exploit for the SQL Server 2000 resolution
          service buffer overflow. This overflow is triggered by
          sending a udp packet to port 1434 which starts with 0x04 and
          is followed by long string terminating with a colon and a
          number. This module should work against any vulnerable SQL
          Server 2000 or MSDE install (pre-SP3).
Microsoft SQL Server 2000 - Resolution Service Heap Overflow
CVE-2002-0649.author: David Litchfield

CVE-2002-1123.name: MS02-056 Microsoft SQL Server Hello Overflow
CVE-2002-1123.description:
By sending malformed data to TCP port 1433, an
          unauthenticated remote attacker could overflow a buffer and
          possibly execute code on the server with SYSTEM level
          privileges. This module should work against any vulnerable
          SQL Server 2000 or MSDE install (< SP3).
Microsoft SQL Server 2000 - User Authentication Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-1123.author: Dave Aitel

CVE-2002-0965.name: Oracle 8i TNS Listener SERVICE_NAME Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-0965.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Oracle. When
          sending a specially crafted packet containing a long SERVICE_NAME
          to the TNS service, an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.
Oracle 8i - TNS Listener SERVICE_NAME Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2002-0965.author: Metasploit

CVE-2002-1359.name: PuTTY Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-1359.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the PuTTY SSH client that is
          triggered through a validation error in SSH.c. This vulnerability
          affects versions 0.53 and earlier.

CVE-2002-1059.name: SecureCRT SSH1 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-1059.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in SecureCRT <= 4.0
          Beta 2. By sending a vulnerable client an overly long
          SSH1 protocol identifier string, it is possible to execute
          arbitrary code.

          This module has only been tested on SecureCRT 3.4.4.
SecureCRT 2.4/3.x/4.0 - SSH1 Identifier String Buffer Overflow (1)
CVE-2002-1059.author: Kyuzo

CVE-2002-1059.description: SecureCRT 2.4/3.x/4.0 - SSH1 Identifier String Buffer Overflow (2)
CVE-2002-1059.author: andrea lisci

CVE-2002-1059.description: SecureCRT 4.0 Beta 2 SSH1 - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2002-1059.author: Metasploit

CVE-2002-2226.name: TFTPD32 Long Filename Buffer Overflow
CVE-2002-2226.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in TFTPD32 version 2.21
          and prior. By sending a request for an overly long file name
          to the tftpd32 server, a remote attacker could overflow a buffer and
          execute arbitrary code on the system.
